## рҹҢҹ бҙҖКҷбҙҸбҙңбҙӣ

**ЙҙбҙҸКҷЙӘбҙӣбҙҖ рқ—« бҙҳКҖЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ бҙҚбҙңsЙӘбҙ„ КҷбҙҸбҙӣ** is a next-generation Telegram Music Bot built for speed, beauty, and reliability.

Enjoy lag-free playback, premium buttons, crystal-clear audio, beautiful thumbnails, autoplay, channel streaming, and powerful group management features.

> вңҰ бҙҳбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮКҖбҙҮбҙ… КҷКҸ В» [@II_NOBITA_X_PRIME_II](https://t.me/II_NOBITA_X_PRIME_II)

---

## вңЁ Т“бҙҮбҙҖбҙӣбҙңКҖбҙҮs

| Feature | Description |
|---|---|
| рҹҺө **Music Streaming** | Play any song from YouTube, Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud |
| рҹҺһ **Video Streaming** | Full HD video streaming in voice chats |
| рҹ“» **Live Stream** | Stream live radio & live URLs |
| рҹ“Ӣ **Queue System** | Multi-track queuing with skip, pause, resume |
| рҹ”Ғ **Autoplay** | Auto-queues related songs when playlist ends |
| рҹ“Ў **Channel Play** | Stream music directly into Telegram channels |
| рҹ”Ҡ **Audio Effects** | Bass boost, reverb, nightcore, and more |
| рҹ–ј **Thumbnails** | Dynamic play card with watermark & fallback image |
| рҹ‘‘ **Admin Controls** | Full group admin management |
| рҹҢҗ **Multi-language** | Support for multiple languages |
| рҹ’° **Crypto Tools** | Live TON/USDT price, wallet balance |
| рҹ’ё **UPI Tools** | Save UPI ID, generate payment QR |
| рҹ“Ҡ **Bot Stats** | Live uptime, CPU, RAM, storage stats |
| рҹ§№ **CleanMongo** | Clean junk DB data + auto alert when storage near full |

---

## рҹҺө бҙҚбҙңsЙӘбҙ„ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙ…s

```
/play     вҖ” Play audio from YouTube / by name
/vplay    вҖ” Play video in voice chat
/cplay    вҖ” Play in linked channel voice chat
/stream   вҖ” Stream from a live URL
/pause    вҖ” Pause current track
/resume   вҖ” Resume paused track
/skip     вҖ” Skip to next track
/stop     вҖ” Stop streaming & clear queue
/queue    вҖ” View current queue
/shuffle  вҖ” Shuffle the queue
/loop     вҖ” Loop current track / full queue
/volume   вҖ” Adjust volume (1вҖ“200)
/seek     вҖ” Seek to a position in track
/end      вҖ” End voice chat
/cleanmongo вҖ” Clean junk database data (sudo only)
```

---

## рҹӣ  бҙҖбҙ…бҙҚЙӘЙҙ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙ…s

```
/ban /unban /kick /mute /unmute
/promote /demote /pin /unpin
/ban /tban /dban
/warn /rmwarn /warnings
/del /purge /purgeme
/lock /unlock
/nightmode
/auth /unauth
/channelplay вҖ” Link a channel to stream music in
```

---

## рҹ’° бҙӣбҙҸбҙҸКҹ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙ…s

```
/ton      вҖ” Live TON coin price
/usdt     вҖ” Live USDT price
/balance  вҖ” TON wallet balance checker
/setupi   вҖ” Save your UPI ID
/gen      вҖ” Generate UPI payment QR code
/ping     вҖ” Bot ping & response time
/stats    вҖ” Live bot statistics
/id       вҖ” Get user / chat ID
/info     вҖ” User information
```

## рҹҡҖ бҙ…бҙҮбҙҳКҹбҙҸКҸ бҙҸЙҙ КҖбҙҖЙӘКҹбҙЎбҙҖКҸ

### Step 1 вҖ” Fork the repo

Fork this repo to your GitHub account.

### Step 2 вҖ” Create a new Railway project

Go to [railway.app](https://railway.app) вҶ’ **New Project** вҶ’ **Deploy from GitHub repo** вҶ’ select your fork.

### Step 3 вҖ” Set the Start Command

In Railway вҶ’ Service вҶ’ Settings вҶ’ **Start Command**:
```
python3 -m SHUKLAMUSIC
```

### Step 4 вҖ” Add all Variables

Go to your Railway service вҶ’ **Variables** tab вҶ’ add every variable from the table below.

---

## рҹ”‘ бҙҖКҹКҹ бҙҮЙҙбҙ ЙӘКҖбҙҸЙҙбҙҚбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ бҙ бҙҖКҖЙӘбҙҖКҷКҹбҙҮs

### рҹ”ҙ Required вҖ” Bot will NOT start without these

| Variable | Description | How to get |
|---|---|---|
| `BOT_TOKEN` | Telegram bot token | [@BotFather](https://t.me/BotFather) вҶ’ `/newbot` |
| `MONGO_DB_URI` | MongoDB connection string | [mongodb.com/atlas](https://cloud.mongodb.com) вҶ’ free cluster вҶ’ Connect вҶ’ Driver вҶ’ copy URI |
| `STRING_SESSION` | Pyrogram session string for assistant userbot | Run `python3 -c "from pyrogram import Client; import asyncio; asyncio.run(Client(':memory:', api_id=YOUR_ID, api_hash='YOUR_HASH').start())"` or use [@StringFatherBot](https://t.me/StringFatherBot) |
| `OWNER_ID` | Your Telegram numeric user ID | Send `/id` to [@userinfobot](https://t.me/userinfobot) |
| `LOGGER_ID` | Numeric ID of your log group/channel | Add bot as admin to a group, send a message, use [@getidsbot](https://t.me/getidsbot) |

---

### рҹҹЎ Strongly Recommended вҖ” Set these to your own values

| Variable | Default value | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `API_ID` | `38987335` | Telegram API ID from [my.telegram.org](https://my.telegram.org) вҶ’ App info |
| `API_HASH` | `540c20b4512ccc762d72dabd45a30e47` | Telegram API Hash from [my.telegram.org](https://my.telegram.org) |
| `LOG_GROUP_ID` | same as `LOGGER_ID` | Log group ID (can be same as `LOGGER_ID`) |
| `OWNER_USERNAME` | `II_NOBITA_X_PRIME_II` | Your Telegram username (without @) |
| `BOT_USERNAME` | `RADHA_MUSIC_GMS_op_bot` | Your bot's username (without @) |
| `BOT_NAME` | `NOBITA X PRIME` | Display name for your bot |
| `UPSTREAM_REPO` | `https://github.com/dhruvkumarray3-eng/DHRUV_X_RADHA` | Your GitHub repo URL |
| `UPSTREAM_BRANCH` | `main` | Branch to pull updates from |
| `GIT_TOKEN` | _(none)_ | GitHub personal access token (for `/update` command) вҖ” generate at [github.com/settings/tokens](https://github.com/settings/tokens) |
| `SUPPORT_CHANNEL` | `https://t.me/fragmentiic` | Your support/update channel link |
| `SUPPORT_CHAT` | `https://t.me/fragmentiic` | Your support group link |

---

### рҹҹў Optional вҖ” Multiple Assistants (for high-traffic bots)

You can add up to **6 extra userbot assistants** to handle more simultaneous calls.

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `STRING_SESSION2` | Pyrogram session for 2nd assistant userbot |
| `STRING_SESSION3` | Pyrogram session for 3rd assistant userbot |
| `STRING_SESSION4` | Pyrogram session for 4th assistant userbot |
| `STRING_SESSION5` | Pyrogram session for 5th assistant userbot |
| `STRING_SESSION6` | Pyrogram session for 6th assistant userbot |
| `STRING_SESSION7` | Pyrogram session for 7th assistant userbot |

---

### рҹҺө Optional вҖ” Spotify Integration

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID` | _(built-in)_ | Spotify app client ID from [developer.spotify.com](https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard) |
| `SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET` | _(built-in)_ | Spotify app client secret |

---

### вҡҷпёҸ Optional вҖ” Limits & Behaviour

| Variable | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `DURATION_LIMIT` | `17000` | Max song duration in minutes (17000 = no limit) |
| `SERVER_PLAYLIST_LIMIT` | `3000` | Max tracks fetched from a playlist |
| `PLAYLIST_FETCH_LIMIT` | `25` | Tracks shown per playlist page |
| `SONG_DOWNLOAD_DURATION` | `9999999` | Max duration (seconds) allowed for download |
| `AUTO_LEAVING_ASSISTANT` | `True` | Auto-leave VC when no one is listening (`True`/`False`) |
| `ASSISTANT_LEAVE_TIME` | `9000` | Seconds before assistant auto-leaves empty VC |
| `TG_AUDIO_FILESIZE_LIMIT` | `5242880000` | Max Telegram audio file size (bytes, default 5 GB) |
| `TG_VIDEO_FILESIZE_LIMIT` | `5242880000` | Max Telegram video file size (bytes, default 5 GB) |

---

### рҹ–ј Optional вҖ” Custom Image URLs

All images have working defaults. Override any of these with your own direct image URLs (must be publicly accessible):

| Variable | Used for |
|---|---|
| `START_IMG_URL` | `/start` command photo |
| `PING_IMG_URL` | `/ping` response photo |
| `PLAYLIST_IMG_URL` | Playlist command photo |
| `STATS_IMG_URL` | `/stats` response photo |
| `TELEGRAM_AUDIO_URL` | Now-playing card for Telegram audio files |
| `TELEGRAM_VIDEO_URL` | Now-playing card for Telegram video files |
| `STREAM_IMG_URL` | Now-playing card for index/URL streams |
| `SOUNCLOUD_IMG_URL` | Now-playing card for SoundCloud tracks |
| `YOUTUBE_IMG_URL` | Fallback thumbnail when YouTube thumb unavailable |
| `SPOTIFY_ARTIST_IMG_URL` | Spotify artist info card |
| `SPOTIFY_ALBUM_IMG_URL` | Spotify album info card |
| `SPOTIFY_PLAYLIST_IMG_URL` | Spotify playlist info card |
| `PING_VIDEO_URL` | Video used in `/ping` animation |
| `SHASHANK_IMG` | Watermark base image on thumbnails |

---

### вқҢ Not Needed on Railway

| Variable | Reason |
|---|---|
| `HEROKU_APP_NAME` | Heroku-specific, skip on Railway |
| `HEROKU_API_KEY` | Heroku-specific, skip on Railway |

---

## рҹ“ұ бҙҚЙӘЙҙЙӘ бҙҖбҙҳбҙҳ / бҙЎбҙҮКҷбҙҖбҙҳбҙҳ

> **No mini app is required.** The old WebApp button has been removed from the bot. The `/start` menu uses regular Telegram buttons only вҖ” no external URL, no WebApp link, no extra setup needed.

---

## рҹ”‘ бҙҚЙӘЙҙЙӘбҙҚбҙңбҙҚ КҖбҙҖЙӘКҹбҙЎбҙҖКҸ sбҙҮбҙӣбҙңбҙҳ (5 бҙ бҙҖКҖЙӘбҙҖКҷКҹбҙҮs)

Just these 5 are enough to get the bot running:

```
BOT_TOKEN       = your_bot_token_here
MONGO_DB_URI    = mongodb+srv://user:pass@cluster.mongodb.net/dbname
STRING_SESSION  = your_pyrogram_string_session
OWNER_ID        = 123456789
LOGGER_ID       = -100123456789
```

Everything else has a working default.

---

## рҹ”§ КңбҙҸбҙЎ бҙӣбҙҸ ЙўбҙҮбҙӣ sбҙӣКҖЙӘЙҙЙў sбҙҮssЙӘбҙҸЙҙ

**Option 1 вҖ” Use a bot:**
Send `/start` to [@StringFatherBot](https://t.me/StringFatherBot) вҖ” enter your phone, API ID, API hash вҶ’ copy the session string.

**Option 2 вҖ” Run locally:**
```python
# Install: pip install pyrogram TgCrypto
from pyrogram import Client
app = Client(":memory:", api_id=YOUR_API_ID, api_hash="YOUR_API_HASH")
app.run(app.export_session_string())
```

---

## рҹ’Һ бҙЎКңКҸ бҙ„КңбҙҸбҙҸsбҙҮ ЙҙбҙҸКҷЙӘбҙӣбҙҖ рқ—« бҙҳКҖЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ?

- рҹ”Ғ **Smart Autoplay** вҖ” Never lets the music stop
- рҹ“Ў **Channel Support** вҖ” Stream to channels, not just groups
- рҹ”’ **Secure** вҖ” Protected against spam & abuse
- рҹӣЎ **Stable** вҖ” 24/7 uptime with auto-restart
- рҹ§  **Smart Queue** вҖ” Intelligent playback management
- рҹҢҚ **Multi-Platform** вҖ” YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud & more
- рҹҺӯ **Custom Thumbnails** вҖ” Dynamic play card with watermark + fallback
- рҹ’¬ **Full Admin Suite** вҖ” Complete group management
